vocab.api: net/http standard library or chi router. Handler: func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request). JSON: json.NewEncoder(w).Encode().
vocab.database: database/sql + pgx driver for PostgreSQL. sqlc for type-safe query generation from .sql files.
vocab.authentication: golang-jwt/jwt v5. Middleware pattern: next http.Handler wrapping. Context values for user propagation.
vocab.error: Explicit error returns. fmt.Errorf with %w for wrapping. errors.Is() and errors.As() for inspection.
vocab.concurrency: goroutines with go keyword. sync.WaitGroup for fan-out. channels for typed communication. context.WithCancel for cancellation.
